response.overview: After being unnoticed and doubted for years, a 16-year-old Chinese ice hockey player faces the question every student-athlete in China must confront: should he follow the path designed by his parents and give up the sport he loves? As expectations and uncertainty pulls him into a spiral of self-doubt, an American football coach enters the story, and the boy must decide what truly matters to him.
response.title: Driven by You
